record.field: Look up a member's subscription status
What's John's subscription status? Is Sarah's membership active? Check Test8's plan Does Mike have an active subscription? What plan is Jane on?
Create a new subscription for a member
Create a monthly subscription for John Sign Sarah up for the unlimited plan Add Test8 to the family membership Set up a yearly plan for Mike Start a new subscription for Jane
Cancel John's subscription End Sarah's membership Stop Test8's plan Terminate Mike's subscription Cancel Jane's membership plan
List active subscriptions whose end_date falls within the next N days (default 30)

What subscriptions are ending? Which contracts are expiring soon? How many contracts are ending this month? Show me expiring memberships Who has a contract ending soon? List subscriptions expiring in the next 30 days Any contracts about to expire? Which members are up for renewal?
Pause Alex's membership Put Sarah's subscription on hold Suspend John's membership temporarily
Resume Alex's membership Reactivate Sarah's subscription Unpause John's membership
List all members who currently have an active subscription
Show me all members with active subscriptions List current paying members Who has an active membership? Show all members with active plans Which members are currently subscribed?
Aggregate count of all subscriptions grouped by state. Returns a dashboard-style breakdown of subscription health across the school.

Give me a subscription breakdown How many active subscriptions do we have? Show me subscription stats What's the breakdown of member subscription states? How many members are paused vs active? Summarize our subscription status How many contracts are active? Give me a contract breakdown
Record a credit transaction (grant, hold, or adjust credits)
Add 5 credits to John's account Deduct 2 credits from Sarah Adjust Test8's credits for makeup class
Create a monthly unlimited plan for $150 Add a new credits-based plan called 10-Pack Set up an annual subscription plan for kids BJJ
Look up billing/payment status for a specific member or family

Has the Smith family paid? Check if John's invoice is paid Is Sarah's account up to date? What's the payment status for the Johnson family? Has Mike paid this month? Is there an outstanding balance for the Garcias?
List invoices filtered by payment status
Show overdue invoices Which families haven't paid? List all unpaid invoices Show me who is behind on payments Who has overdue bills? Show unpaid accounts List paid invoices this month
